commatrix.description: Communication matrix - validates node open ports match documented matrix, compares actual ports vs EndpointSlice data, checks for undocumented/stale ports, and verifies nftables rules after reboot

classification_hints.matrix_mismatch: Ports open on node but not documented in matrix, or documented but not in use
classification_hints.test_failure: e2e test assertion failed comparing actual vs expected ports

ptp-operator.description: PTP operator - deploys and manages Precision Time Protocol on OpenShift nodes

classification_hints.test_failure: PTP sync test failed - clock offset too high or ptp4l not syncing
classification_hints.infra: PTP hardware not available or nodes missing PTP-capable NICs

cnf-features-deploy.description: CNF features - validates telco/CNF features (DPDK, SR-IOV, PTP, SCTP, etc.)

classification_hints.infra: Worker nodes missing required hardware (SR-IOV NICs, hugepages, etc.)

sriov-network-operator.description: SR-IOV network operator - manages SR-IOV network devices and VFs on Kubernetes

classification_hints.test_failure: SR-IOV VF creation or network attachment failed
classification_hints.infra: No SR-IOV capable NICs found on worker nodes
